mapper.select: select config_scope, auto_fix_enabled, max_fix_rounds, allow_persist_needs_human_review, human_review_severity_threshold, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at from compile_review_settings where config_scope = 'default'
mapper.insert: insert into compile_review_settings ( config_scope, auto_fix_enabled, max_fix_rounds, allow_persist_needs_human_review, human_review_severity_threshold, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{record.configScope}, #{record.autoFixEnabled}, #{record.maxFixRounds}, #{record.allowPersistNeedsHumanReview}, #{record.humanReviewSeverityThreshold}, #{record.createdBy}, #{record.updatedBy}, coalesce(#{record.createdAt}, current_timestamp), current_timestamp ) on conflict (config_scope) do update set auto_fix_enabled = excluded.auto_fix_enabled, max_fix_rounds = excluded.max_fix_rounds, allow_persist_needs_human_review = excluded.allow_persist_needs_human_review, human_review_severity_threshold = excluded.human_review_severity_threshold, updated_by = excluded.updated_by, updated_at = current_timestamp
